action.reasoning: Observation: mean_r2 improved to positive 0.3027 (new best) with all r2 components now positive; ptend_q=0.0757 (val~0.173) remains weakest, others 0.44/0.83/0.52. 50 epochs (~26min) with noise=0.1, q_weight=8, select-on-val_r2_q, clip[-50,50] in predict, residual blocks worked to cross zero but gen gap persists. Curves show val_mse plateau ~0.0054. Analysis: q-tendency outliers hurt R2 on test dist-shift; capacity (768/4) and reg ok but can tune. Data maxabs (t~23,q~3,rad/precip~3) suggests clip can be tightened to [-20,20]. Decision: increment capacity (hidden=960/blocks=5), tune to noise=0.05/dropout=0.25/q_weight=12/output_std=1e-4/lr=5e-4/epochs=60, select best on mean_val_r2 for balance, cosine scheduler, add torch seed, tighten predict clip to [-20,20]; update train.py/model.py/predict.py, train then submit_eval on best.pt (fits time budget).
